hero.badge: v2025.2 · Rwanda Coding Academy · Umwaka wa 2
hero.subheadline: Umuhanga wa software ukomoka mu Rwanda wasenze ngo abashe kwinjira mu bushakuzi, yabonye ijwi rye mu mwaka wa 2, noneho ubaka ibintu bifite agaciro.

milestones.title: Isengesho
milestones.body: Nabonye umunyeshuri umwe ku ishuri ryanjye yinjira mu Rwanda Coding Academy. Nabigize inshingano yanjye. Nasenze ibyo buri munsi. Igihe cyose nifashaga interineti, nasubukaga ku rubuga rwa RCA ngo ndebe byinshi kuri iyo shuri. Uko ni ko nari nshaka.

milestones.title: Kwakirwa
milestones.body: Data ni umubaji. Mama n'umuhinzi. Turi abana batanu kandi ndi uwa kabiri. Ntarigeze ngira PC. Icyongereza cyanjye cyari hafi ubusa. Nari nkekaje cyane niba mbere ndashoboye. Hanyuma icyemuzo cyaje. Cyumvise nk'igitangaza. Kuko cyari cyo.
milestones.pill: Abahawe 80 ba mbere · O-Level · Icyongereza, Imibare, Fizika

milestones.title: Umwaka wa 1 · Uceceye
milestones.body: Bose bavugaga: uyu mugabo ntavuga. Ijwi ryanjye ntiryumvaga neza mu cyumba. Numvaga nk'umuntu utari mu mwanya we. Nabajije niba mbere ndi mu mwanya wanjye. Ariko nakomeje. Nceceye.

milestones.title: Umwaka wa 2 · Ihinduka
milestones.body: Byose byahindutse mu mwaka wa 2. Amanota meza. Natangiye kuvuga. Icyizere cyanjye cyarushijeho. Naretse kwigunga. Natangiye gukorana n'abandi. Natangiye kuyobora.

milestones.title: Kubakira Abandi
milestones.body: Nubaka sisitemu nyayo. Ndarangwa umuryango nyayo. Nita ku bantu bari hafi ya RCA, atari code gusa. Mbere abantu bareba cyangwa batareba, ndabikora.

milestones.title: Inzozi
milestones.body: MIT cyangwa Stanford. Nabyivugiye k'uruhonde abantu baseka. Nkaba ndabivuze. Ukwizera ni ko kwanzaniye hano. Ukwizera ni ko kuzajya impagana.

engineering.label: 04 · uko ntekereza kuri sisitemu
engineering.title: Atari ibyo nubaka gusa.

cards.title: Academix: Kuki Microservices?
cards.body: Nahisemo microservices kuri Academix atari uko inyigisho zibivuga, ahubwo kubera ko urwego rwafitega imitwe yigenga — abanyeshuri, inyandiko, n'ubuyobozi bihinduka ku buryo butandukanye. Icyo ntarigeze nteganya ni ukuri ubwinshi bw'ingorane zishya: kwemeza umwironderi hagati ya serivisi, imipaka y'ibyatanzwe, no gusana porogaramu hagati y'ibice byatwaye ubuhanga nyabwo.

cards.title: MediSafe: AI mu Nzego Zikomeye
cards.body: Kubaka MediSafe byantumye ntekereza mu buryo butandukanye. Iyo porogaramu yibeshye mu nzego nyinshi, utakaza amakuru. Iyo porogaramu y'ubuvuzi yibeshye, umuntu ashobora gukomeretswa. Ubwo bushoboza bwafashe buri cyemezo: uko nakijije ibyo ukoresha yinjije, uko nasuzumye imikoranire y'imirere, uko nateguye NLP kugira ngo igume mu nzira ziziguye.

terminalLines: > monoliths ntabwo zihagaze neza kugeza ugiye kongera ubushobozi
> gusana porogaramu zikoreshwa mu buryo butandukanye birakomeye kuruta gushushanya
> ububiko bwiza ni uko itsinda ryawe ribasha gusobanukirwa
> gukora optimisation mbere y'igihe ni ukuri, narabikoze, byantwaye igihe
> inyandiko ntabwo ari amahitamo, ni sisitemu ubwayo

growth.label: 03 · gukura
growth.title: Uko nageze hano.
growth.subtitle: Ntabwo aki ikarita y'ibikorwa. Ni urugendo. Buri kintu cyose ni umwanya nyakuri — ikintu cyubatswe, ikintu cyamenetse, ikintu cyumvikanye.

projects.label: 05 · ibyo nubatse
projects.title: Ibibazo nyabyo.

primary.name: Uptime
primary.tagline: Website monitoring that actually works. Multi-region. Multi-tenant. Fully monetized.
primary.desc:
I am building a monitoring platform from scratch.

The idea is simple: your website goes down at 3am, your team knows within seconds — not when a customer complains.

The hard part is not the monitoring itself. The hard part is not raising false alarms. If one region sees a failure but three others don't, that is not an outage. That is a network hiccup. Multi-region consensus is what separates real monitoring from noise.

Every company on the platform gets a public status page — the kind Stripe and GitHub have. Except I built mine from scratch, at Rwanda Coding Academy, in Year 2.

It has subscription billing. It is multi-tenant. It is the most serious thing I have ever built. I do not know if it will succeed. But I know it is real.
primary.arch:
→ monitoring workers   poll endpoints every 30–60s
→ multi-region nodes   consensus required for outage
→ alert dispatcher     Slack · Email · PagerDuty
→ status page engine   public · live · 90-day history
→ billing layer        subscription plans · multi-tenant
→ tenant isolation     each company fully separated
primary.closingUptime: This is not finished. But it is the most real thing I have ever built. I am a Year 2 student at Rwanda Coding Academy. I started this because I needed it to exist. That is usually a good enough reason.

primary.name: MediSafe
primary.tagline: Helping patients manage medications safely with AI.
primary.desc: Built for people living with chronic illness who struggle to track prescriptions and side effects every day. Healthcare software should feel like care, not complexity.
primary.arch: AI-powered · medication validation · natural language input
primary.evolution: MediSafe v1 → current: how it started, how it's going

primary.name: Academix
primary.tagline: A full microservices school management system.
primary.desc: Designed to bring efficiency to academic institutions. Students, records, workflows — all connected. Built to actually work at scale, not just in demos.

primary.name: furnit
primary.tagline: A furniture web experience built with care.
primary.desc: A frontend project where I focused purely on UI craft — clean design, smooth interactions, product feel.

secondary.name: Automailio
secondary.desc: An email automation platform — campaigns, templates, scheduling, delivery logs. Built with Java Spring Boot on the backend and React on the frontend. Containerized with Docker. This one taught me that building for reliability is a completely different challenge than building for functionality.

secondary.name: Enrollia
secondary.desc: An enrollment management dashboard built with Refine and Supabase. Handles data, access control, and admin workflows. The SQL schema is the part I'm most proud of — getting the data model right before writing a single line of React.

secondary.name: RFID System
secondary.desc: An RFID-based web system — hardware meets software. I built the web layer that connects to physical RFID readers. This came from a real problem we worked on at school. It's not perfect, but it's real, and it works. I also wrote C++ for Bluetooth communication and servo control — because I was curious, and curiosity doesn't wait for a syllabus.

secondary.name: MARKET-TRUTH
secondary.desc: A market information tool built in TypeScript. Someone forked it. That was the first time I realized something I built was useful to a stranger. It was a small moment, but it meant something.

secondary.name: Lumen
secondary.desc: Lumen — a full-stack TypeScript product with a separate frontend and backend. This is the most starred project on this account. I don't know exactly why people liked it, but I know I built it carefully. Both repos. Both mine.

secondary.name: Igihango Digital
secondary.desc: Igihango — a digital contract/agreement platform. 'Igihango' is Kinyarwanda for covenant or agreement. I built this for a Rwandan context because I believe software should solve problems where people actually are. JavaScript frontend, Python backend. Two repos, one idea.

secondary.name: Adheronix Demo
secondary.desc: Adheronix — a product demo built in TypeScript and deployed live. I built this to present something real. It is one of the larger things I've shipped. Not everything I build is for myself.

secondary.name: AI Resume Analyzer
secondary.desc: An AI tool that reads and analyzes resumes. I built this recently. It's not finished. But I believe in shipping things before they're perfect and learning from what breaks.

projects.closingNote:
These are some of what I've built.
There are 41 repositories across two GitHub accounts.
Some are unfinished. Some are experiments.
Some are things I'm not ready to talk about yet.
But every single one taught me something.
That's why I keep building.

mytime.label: 06 · igihe cyanjye
mytime.title: IGIHE CYANJYE
mytime.subtitle: Ntabwo ari inzozi. Ni ibintu byagenwe. Buri segonda ihindura ubushobozi mu bikorwa.
mytime.closing: Kubara igihe ntabwo ari ukugera ku ntsinzi. Ni ukubera uwo nzaba.

missions.title: Kwinjira muri MIT / Stanford
missions.reflection: Nitegura ibintu nyabyo, ntabwo ari imyitwarire. Nubaka ibimenyetso mbere y'uko amahirwe agera.

missions.title: Kuvugana n'abashakashatsi ba MIT / Stanford
missions.reflection: Ntabwo ndindiriza kuba indanga. Ntumbera kuba umuntu udashidikanywaho.

missions.title: Indege ya mbere
missions.reflection: Bamwe barindira ejo hazaza. Njye ndubaka iwanjye segonda ku yindi.

missions.title: Akazi ka mbere k'ubuhanga
missions.reflection: Buri segonda irenga yongera intera hagati y'uko nari n'uko nzaba.

missions.title: Guhura n'umuterankunga
missions.reflection: Ntabwo nzi niba bizatsinda. Ariko nzi ko ari ukuri.

missions.title: Kuvoma 1M$ ya mbere
missions.reflection: Kubara igihe ntabwo ari ukugera ku ntsinzi. Ni ukubera uwo nzaba.

community.label: 08 · hakurya ya code
community.title: Umuhanga wandika kode gusa
community.description: Nizera ko RCA ifite inshingano ku baturage bayikikije, atari abanyeshuri bayo gusa. Nateganya gusanga abantu. Nshyira hamwe. Nirwanira abantu batugufi. Ntabwo mbikora kugira ngo mbone ibyishimo. Ndabikora kuko bihari.
community.quoteLine2: > "Ibyo ntekereje mbikora abantu bandeba cyangwa batandeba."
community.quoteLine3: (Ibyo nkora, ndabikora abantu bareba cyangwa batareba.)
community.tag: Ntabwo ari kuri CV. Ni ukuri.

whyIBuild.label: 09 · impamvu
whyIBuild.title: Impamvu Nubaka
whyIBuild.line1: Kubera nzi uko bimera kukura udafite ubushobozi.
whyIBuild.line2: Kubera nzi uko bimeze kwicara mu cyumba ukibaza niba ukenewe.
whyIBuild.line3: Kubera nabonye tekinoloji ihindura ubuzima bwanjye burundu — nk'umwana utuje i Gatsibo utarigeza akora kuri PC, noneho ubaka sisitemu zikoresha AI ndetse n'iyobora abantu.
whyIBuild.line5: Noneho ndashaka kubaka ibintu bizafasha bibabereho ku bandi.

cards.label: igishusho 01
cards.title: Ubwa mbere inyigisho zitari zihagije.
cards.body: Natekereje ko nsobanukiwe Node.js kuko nashoboraga gukurikira. Hanyuma ngerageje kubaka ikintu nyacyo kandi nta kintu cyakoraga nk'uko inyigisho yavugaga. Uwo munsi numvise: kumenya gukoporera ntabwo ari ukumenya kubaka.

cards.label: igishusho 02
cards.title: Umushinga nagiye nongera uvuye inyuma.
cards.body: Nubatse backend yakoraga kuri mashini yanjye gusa ahandi hatari. Ibitekerezo bitari byo, ububiko butari bwo, uburyo butari bwo. Gutangira ubushya birababaza. Ariko bigusha umubano kuruta ikindi kintu cyose. Ntabwo nkibwa gutangira ubushya.

cards.label: igishusho 03
cards.title: Igihe numvaga icyizere gitsimbwa, ntabwo gitangwa.
cards.body: Sinigeze nizera ko mbere ndi mu mwanya mu bintu nk'ibi. Nari nceceye kuko nari mfite ubwoba. Atari uko nta cyo nari mfite cyo kuvuga. Umwaka wa 2 yanyigishije: icyizere ntabwo ari imiterere y'umuntu. Ni umwuga. Ndifuza buri munsi.

obsession.label: 11 · ibyo nirukanka none
thoughtsItems: > kiki gituma sisitemu nyinshi zitsindwa mu kugera ku kigero kinini?
> ni iki gituma porogaramu ikora neza?
> tekinoloji irashobora kugabanya ubusumbane mu Rwanda?

becoming.label: 12 · inzira
becoming.title: Umuhanga
paragraphs: Ndashaka kubaka sisitemu zifite agaciro mu buzima n'uburezi — ingengo ebyiri aho porogaramu zishobora guhindura ubuzima bukabije.
Ndashaka gusobanukirwa n'ibikorwa remezo bihagije kugira ngo nubake ibintu bishobora kwaguka hakurya y'ibyo nshobora gutekereza.

Ndashaka gukora ubushakashatsi — muri MIT cyangwa Stanford — ku buryo sisitemu zikoreshwa mu buryo butandukanye na AI zishobora gukorera hamwe mu bidukikije bifite ibikoresho bike n'ibyo bisabwa byinshi nk'ibyo nkuriye.
becoming.closing: Ndi umuhanga w'ikoranabuhanga ukora n'ishyanga. Uwo ni we muhanga mba.

phases.label: Igihe 1 · Ubu
phases.desc: RCA Umwaka wa 2 · Gutanga sisitemu nyayo

cards.title: Kwizera
cards.body: Yesu Kristo ni shingiro ry'ibyo nubatse n'ibyo ndi. Atari imikorere. Atari ikirango. Ukuri.

cards.title: Ukuri
cards.body: Iyi portfolio irimo ibyo nakoze gusa. Ntabwo nshaka kukwereka byinshi ndabeshyi. Nkunda kukwereka bike nkaba mpamo.

cards.title: Gukora
cards.body: Naje mu bukene: nta PC, nta cyongereza, nta shuri. Ibyo nari mfite ni imbaraga n'isengesho. Byari bihagije kugira ngo binyane hano. Bizahagije kugira ngo bijye impagana.

cards.title: Abantu
cards.body: Code ni igikoresho. Intego ni abantu. Nubaka porogaramu nk'uko nyobora ishyanga: atari kugira ngo mbone ibyishimo, ahubwo kubera ingaruka.

contact.label: 14 · twhuze
contact.title: Niba ubaka ikintu gifite umumaro, kigoye, cyangwa gishingiye ku muntu — ndashimishwa no kubyumva.
contact.alertMessage: Ikintu cyagenze nabi. Nyamuneka ndangiza imeyili kuri mugishaivanbright250@gmail.com
contact.sponsorText: Ndi gushaka umufatanyabikorwa wizera aho nerekeje. Niba usomye kugeza hano ugahita ushaka ikintu — wandikira. Ntabwo nzapfusha ubushobozi bwawe.
